subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Horizon! At this hour, when the spirit-stirring breeze of holiness wafteth from the gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمنظر اکبر در این ساعت که نسیم روح پرور روحانی از ریاض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for protection, @humility; meekness; lowliness
